3070990.name: Dream Pinball 3D Soundtrack
3070990.description:
Experience the unique sound of Dream Pinball 3D as a standalone musical journey!
The Original Soundtrack features all 14 dynamic in-game tracks, plus 4 exclusive bonus songs composed by the legendary Harold Faltermeyer (Beverly Hills Cop, Top Gun, Tango & Cash).
Enjoy over one hour of pure retro energy, blending classic arcade vibes, synth-driven melodies, and pinball excitement in perfect harmony.

  • 14 original tracks from Dream Pinball 3D

  • 4 exclusive bonus tracks by Harold Faltermeyer

  • Total playing time: over 60 minutes of music
